title: Ancient City Loot
quickAnswer: Ancient cities have elite loot, but they are not efficient early-game targets. Go when you can handle stealth, escape tools, and the risk of triggering wardens.
keyFacts: Notable loot includes Swift Sneak books, echo shards, enchanted gear, and rare trim or disc rewards.
The real danger is shrieker chains that escalate into warden spawns, not normal mob combat.
Wool, sneaking, and careful route planning are stronger than brute-force fighting here.
commonMistakes: Treating the area like a normal dungeon and making too much noise.
Going for loot before you have strong mobility or a safe exit route.
